dataset: UK Customer Reviews 2022-2024 (Trustpilot / Amazon UK modelled)
evaluated_on: held-out test set only — never seen during training

confusion_matrix_notes.negative_row: 262 actual negatives: 241 correct, 12 misclassified as neutral, 9 as positive
confusion_matrix_notes.neutral_row: 130 actual neutrals:  89 correct, 18 misclassified as negative, 23 as positive
confusion_matrix_notes.positive_row: 308 actual positives: 285 correct, 8 misclassified as negative, 15 as neutral
confusion_matrix_notes.hardest_class: Neutral — smallest class (250 total), most ambiguous semantically

overfitting_check.explanation: Gap of 0.031 is well below the 0.05 threshold. Train and val loss track closely across all 3 epochs, confirming no significant overfitting.

leakage_check.split_performed_before: Tokenisation — no information from val/test influenced preprocessing
leakage_check.test_set_used_for: Final evaluation only — never used for hyperparameter selection or early stopping
leakage_check.class_weights_source: Computed on train set only using sklearn compute_class_weight
leakage_check.tokeniser: Pretrained distilbert-base-uncased tokeniser — not fitted on data
leakage_check.tfidf_scope: Fitted on full corpus for visualisation only — not used as model features

regularisation_applied.optimizer: AdamW with grouped parameter weight decay
